verdicts.reasoning: The homepage confirms that Lark is a productivity superapp for chat, meetings, docs, and projects, aligning with the recorded description.
The authentication documentation confirms the existence of OAuth2, token, and other methods as stated in the record.
The documentation indicates that users can create an app and obtain App ID and App Secret through a self-serve process, supporting the recorded claim.
The Open Platform documentation confirms a broad REST API surface, which aligns with the recorded value.
The availability of public developer docs and self-serve app creation supports the claim that development is possible today.
